Product information:
Fabric name: Nylon
Size: M = 4 yards (80-90cm 10.00 kilograms-13.50 kilograms, L = 5 yards (90-100cm 13.50 kilograms-17.50 kilograms, XL = size 6 (100-110cm 17.50kg-21.50kg,2XL = size 7 (110-120cm 21.50kg-26.00kg,3XL = size 8 (120-130cm kg-30.00kg,4XL = size 9 (130-140cm kg-35.00kg
Applicable Gender: Female
Applicable age: 1-10 years old

Fabric composition: nylon/nylon

Size:    




Note：

1.sian sizes are 1 to 2 sizes smaller than European and American people. Choose the larger size if your size between two sizes. Please allow 2-3cm differences due to manual measurement.

 

2. Please check the size chart carefully before you buy the item, if you don't know how to choose size, please contact our customer service.

 

3.As you know, the different computers display colors differently,  the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the following images.
